description: Campaign log for the QEH / 2026 recruitment-agency landing page. Each entry documents a marketing campaign driving traffic to the site, using the same UTM vocabulary that assets/scrobe.js reads from inbound URLs (source, medium, campaign, content, term).

campaigns.name: Strategy Call — LinkedIn (Services)
campaigns.notes: Primary conversion path. Matches the footer CTA href in index.html and the data-cta="footer" click event captured by scrobe.js.
